Pancamdrifta :— This peculiar Dosa is not met with in
Astrological works; but it is mentioned as a major fault in works
on Dharma Sastra. If the 5th house from the Lagna is occu-
pied by any planet it causes this Arista or trouble. If the planet
in the 5th is the Sun. the subject's father will have trouble; if
it is the Moon, his mother; if Mars, his brothers or sisters; if
Mercury, his maternal uncle; if Jupiter, maternal grandfather;
Venus, mother's sisters; if Saturn, Rahu or Ketu, the child
itself. In our chart the Moon is in the 5th house.
Ekanaksatra It is considered inauspicious, if the child on
the one hand and its father, mother, brother or sister on the other
have the same star. Then too proper propitiation is advised.
Other inauspicious factors :— I have told you that the planets
stand for some relations of the subject. In other words, they
are called the Karakas of relatives.
